name: list_calendars
description:
List all calendars on the user's Google Calendar account.
Returns each calendar's ID, name, timezone, and access level (owner, writer, reader).
Use this to discover which calendars the user has.

Parameters:
- max_results: Maximum number of calendars to return (default 100, max 250).

The calendars returned will contain an id field, which you should use to specify any non-primary calendars in other Google Calendar tools.

max_results.description: Maximum number of calendars to return (default 100, max 250).
